Text: At its meeting on 14 July 2021, the Committee – having been informed that since the expulsion order against the complainant has become time-barred, and he can now submit a new asylum application in Sweden – decided to discontinue the consideration of communication No. 956/2019 on the understanding that the complainant would be entitled to submit a new communication to the Committee in the event of a renewed risk of forcible removal from the State party’s territory.
